a: We specialize in safe opening (non-destructive), safe repair, combination changes, lock replacement and upgrades, emergency safe service, and antique/vintage safe services. We handle all safe types — residential gun safes, commercial safes, electronic locks, and mechanical combinations.

q: Do you offer emergency safe service?
a: Yes! Emergency safe service is available. Call us at (916) 996-9492 and we'll get you back in as quickly as possible.
We're open Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 4 PM. Emergency safe service is available outside those hours — just call.

q: How much does safe opening cost?
a: Safe opening & repair starts at $275, plus a service/trip fee starting at $75. Every safe is different — the final price depends on the type of safe, lock mechanism, and complexity. Call (916) 996-9492 and we can often give you a ballpark over the phone.

We serve the entire greater Sacramento region including: Sacramento, West Sacramento, Citrus Heights, Roseville, Elk Grove, Folsom, Carmichael, Rancho Cordova, Davis, Woodland, Fair Oaks, and North Highlands. If you're nearby, give us a call.

q: Can you open a safe without damaging it?
a: In most cases, yes. We use non-destructive techniques as our first approach. We only resort to destructive methods if the lock is completely seized or the mechanism is beyond repair — and we'll always explain your options first.

q: How long does a safe opening take?
a: Most standard safe openings take between 20 minutes and 2 hours, depending on the complexity. Emergency calls are prioritized and we arrive ready to work.

q: Do you work on antique safes?
a: Absolutely. We have specialized experience with antique and vintage safes from the 1800s through mid-1900s. We treat them with the care and respect they deserve.

q: How much to change a safe combination?
a: A safe combination change is $175 (plus the service/trip fee starting at $75). This includes re-keying or resetting the combination on most safe types. Common when an employee leaves or you want to update security.

q: How much does lock replacement cost?
a: Lock replacement and upgrades start at $275 plus parts. This covers residential and commercial locks, electronic/keypad locks, deadbolts, lever handles, and panic bars.

q: How do I book a service?
a: Call us at (916) 996-9492 or fill out the contact form on this website. For emergencies, call directly for the fastest response.

q: What types of locks do you repair?
a: We work on all standard residential and commercial locks including deadbolts, knob locks, lever handle locks, electronic/keypad locks, and panic bars. Lock replacement and upgrades start at $275 plus parts.

q: What kind of safes do you work on?
a: All kinds — gun safes, home safes, commercial safes, floor safes, wall safes, fire safes, jewelry safes, hotel safes, and antique safes. Brands include Sentry, Cannon, Liberty, AMSEC, Gardall, Hayman, and many more.
Yes, we are fully licensed and insured. You can have peace of mind knowing your property is in professional hands.
